name: occca
description: OpenAI Compatible CLI Coding Agent - A minimal agentic coding CLI using OpenAI-compatible APIs

scripts.build:static: esbuild src/entrypoints/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=dist/bundle.cjs --format=cjs && pkg dist/bundle.cjs --targets node20-win-x64 --out-path dist/bin && (mv dist/bin/bundle.exe dist/bin/occa.exe 2>/dev/null || move dist\bin\bundle.exe dist\bin\occa.exe)
scripts.build:static:win-x64: esbuild src/entrypoints/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=dist/bundle.cjs --format=cjs && pkg dist/bundle.cjs --targets node20-win-x64 --out-path dist/bin && (mv dist/bin/bundle.exe dist/bin/occa-win-x64.exe 2>/dev/null || move dist\bin\bundle.exe dist\bin\occa-win-x64.exe)
scripts.build:static:win-arm64: esbuild src/entrypoints/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=dist/bundle.cjs --format=cjs && pkg dist/bundle.cjs --targets node20-win-arm64 --out-path dist/bin && (mv dist/bin/bundle.exe dist/bin/occa-win-arm64.exe 2>/dev/null || move dist\bin\bundle.exe dist\bin\occa-win-arm64.exe)
scripts.build:static:linux-x64: esbuild src/entrypoints/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=dist/bundle.cjs --format=cjs && pkg dist/bundle.cjs --targets node20-linux-x64 --out-path dist/bin && (mv dist/bin/bundle dist/bin/occa-linux-x64 2>/dev/null || move dist\bin\bundle dist\bin\occa-linux-x64)
scripts.build:static:linux-arm64: esbuild src/entrypoints/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=dist/bundle.cjs --format=cjs && pkg dist/bundle.cjs --targets node20-linux-arm64 --out-path dist/bin && (mv dist/bin/bundle dist/bin/occa-linux-arm64 2>/dev/null || move dist\bin\bundle dist\bin\occa-linux-arm64)
